title: zanthoxylum acuminatum subsp. acuminatum
intro: Zanthoxylum acuminatum subsp. acuminatum, also known as the Narrow-leaved Prickly Ash, is a plant species in the Rutaceae family, characterized by its thorny branches and small white flowers. The medicinal properties of this plant include its ability to act as a natural anti-inflammatory and antiseptic, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum acuminatum subsp. acuminatum include reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
